pi_items.source: task.json metadata; verified against Moodle user profile field creation workflow which allows arbitrary category names
task.json metadata; verified against Moodle user profile field short name requirements which support arbitrary alphanumeric names

task.json metadata; Moodle supports five default user profile field types: checkbox, datetime, menu, text, and textarea. 'text' is one of the standard types. Source: https://moodledev.io/docs/4.4/apis/plugintypes/customfield and confirmed via https://www.colourmylearning.com/2015/05/how-to-lock-user-profile-fields-and-add-custom-fields-in-moodle/
task.json metadata; verified against Moodle user_info_field table schema where required is a TINYINT (0 or 1). Source: https://moodleschema.zoola.io/tables/user_info_field.html

task.json metadata; verified against Moodle user_info_field table schema where locked is a TINYINT (0 or 1). Source: https://moodleschema.zoola.io/tables/user_info_field.html and https://www.colourmylearning.com/2015/05/how-to-lock-user-profile-fields-and-add-custom-fields-in-moodle/
task.json metadata; verified against Moodle user profile field naming conventions

task.json metadata; Moodle supports 'menu' (also called 'Menu of Choices') as one of five standard profile field types. Source: https://www.colourmylearning.com/2015/05/how-to-lock-user-profile-fields-and-add-custom-fields-in-moodle/
task.json metadata; verified against Moodle user_info_field table schema where required is a TINYINT (0 or 1)

task.json metadata; verified against Moodle menu field param1 storage format. Menu options are stored newline-separated in param1 column of mdl_user_info_field table. Source: https://www.moodlewiki.com/books/development/page/user-profile-field-select-options
task.json metadata; verified against Moodle user profile field naming conventions
task.json metadata; Moodle supports 'text' as one of five standard user profile field types

task.json metadata; verified against Moodle user_info_field table schema where defaultdata is a LONGTEXT column that stores default values for profile fields. Source: https://moodleschema.zoola.io/tables/user_info_field.html
install_moodle.sh script shows MOODLE_VERSION='405' (Moodle 4.5) being installed from stable branch MOODLE_405_STABLE

export_result.sh and setup_task.sh scripts query mdl_user_info_category and mdl_user_info_field tables. These are standard Moodle tables for custom profile fields. Source: https://moodleschema.zoola.io/tables/user_info_field.html

privileged_info_summary: The task creates custom profile fields in Moodle 4.5. All metadata claims are verified accurate: (1) Category name 'Employee Information' is a valid arbitrary category name, (2) Field 'employeeid' with datatype 'text' and required=1, locked=1 are valid properties in Moodle's standard profile field system, (3) Field 'department' with datatype 'menu' and required=1 with seven healthcare-related options (Emergency Medicine, Cardiology, Nursing, Pediatrics, Radiology, Surgery, Administration) are valid - 'menu' is one of five standard Moodle datatypes and options are stored newline-separated in param1, (4) Field 'joblevel' with datatype 'text' and defaultdata='Staff' are valid - Moodle supports default values for profile fields. The task operates on standard Moodle database tables mdl_user_info_category and mdl_user_info_field in a Moodle 4.5 installation.
